HomePage.title: Practice Speaking
HomePage.subtitle: Listen to a sentence, repeat it, compare. That's shadowing — a simple way to train pronunciation, rhythm, and fluency.
HomePage.feature1Desc: Follow along sentence by sentence with real-time waveform recording
HomePage.feature2Desc: Paste any link — subtitles are automatically split into segments
HomePage.feature3Desc: All data lives in your browser's IndexedDB. MIT-licensed, code on GitHub.

GuidePage.title: Guide
GuidePage.subtitle: How it works, features, and shortcuts.
GuidePage.whatIsShadowingP1: Shadowing is a language learning technique where you listen to a native speaker and repeat what they say as closely as possible — matching their rhythm, intonation, and pronunciation.
GuidePage.whatIsShadowingP2: Shadowing trains your ear and mouth together — pronunciation, listening, and speaking all at once. Using real YouTube content means real speech patterns instead of textbook phrases.
GuidePage.gettingStartedDetails: Paste a YouTube URL with subtitles — the app extracts sentences automatically. Choose Manual or Auto flow, play each sentence, then record yourself repeating it. Use seekable waveform playback to compare side-by-side and track progress on the dashboard.
GuidePage.manualDesc: You control play, record, and navigation. Step through sentences at your own pace.
GuidePage.autoDesc: Hands-free loop: playback, then recording starts automatically. Voice activity detection stops recording on silence and advances to the next sentence.
GuidePage.liveWaveformDesc: Scrolling voice-memo style visualization during recording.
GuidePage.waveformPlaybackDesc: Seekable waveform display for recorded audio.
GuidePage.transcriptToggleDesc: Blur subtitles to train your ear (press {key}).
GuidePage.progressTrackingDesc: Per-video completion tracking on the dashboard.
GuidePage.localFirstDesc: IndexedDB storage, no servers, no accounts.
GuidePage.openSourceP1: MIT license. The full source is on GitHub.
GuidePage.openSourceP2: All data stays in your browser (IndexedDB). Nothing is sent to a server.
GuidePage.openSourceP3: You can self-host with Vercel, Docker, or any Node.js setup.
GuidePage.faq1Q: What kind of videos work best?
GuidePage.faq1A: Videos with clear speech and accurate subtitles work best. Try TED talks, news clips, interviews, or language learning channels. Avoid videos with heavy background music, multiple overlapping speakers, or auto-generated captions that may be inaccurate.
GuidePage.faq2Q: My video failed to import. What should I do?
GuidePage.faq2A: Make sure the video has subtitles (not just auto-generated ones, though those can work too). Some videos have embedding restrictions that prevent playback. Try a different video or check that the URL is correct.
GuidePage.faq3A: Everything is stored in your browser using IndexedDB. No data is sent to any server. Your recordings, progress, and imported videos all stay on your device.
GuidePage.faq4Q: How do I delete a video or my data?
GuidePage.faq4A: On the Dashboard, each video card has a delete button. To clear all data, you can clear your browser site data for this domain.
GuidePage.faq5A: The app is responsive and works on mobile browsers. However, keyboard shortcuts are only available on desktop. Recording works on most mobile browsers that support the MediaRecorder API.
GuidePage.howToName: How to Practice Shadowing with YouTube Videos
GuidePage.howToDescription: Use Shadowing Space to improve your pronunciation and fluency by practicing with any YouTube video.

ImportClient.title: Import YouTube Captions
ImportClient.description: Input a YouTube URL, fetch available tracks, choose one track, then start sentence-by-sentence shadowing.

ImportClient.errorFetchFirst: Please fetch tracks and choose one track first.
ImportClient.errorNoContent: No usable caption content was found in available tracks. Please try another video.
ImportClient.errorINVALID_VIDEO_URL: Please enter a valid single YouTube video URL.

ImportClient.errorTRANSCRIPTS_DISABLED: Transcripts are disabled for this video.
ImportClient.errorNO_CAPTION_TRACKS: No caption tracks were found for this video.
ImportClient.errorCAPTION_CONTENT_EMPTY: The caption track exists but has no content.
ImportClient.errorCAPTION_PARSING_FAILED: Failed to parse the caption data from YouTube.

ImportClient.errorTOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
ImportClient.errorTRACK_TOKEN_INVALID: The track selection is invalid. Please re-fetch tracks.
ImportClient.errorTRACK_TOKEN_EXPIRED: The track selection has expired. Please re-fetch tracks.

Metadata.homeDescription: Practice speaking with any YouTube video. Listen, record yourself, and compare side-by-side. All data stays in your browser.
Metadata.guideDescription: Step-by-step guide to shadowing practice with YouTube videos. Learn manual and auto practice modes, keyboard shortcuts, and answers to common questions.
Metadata.importDescription: Paste a YouTube URL to extract subtitles and start shadowing practice.
Metadata.dashboardDescription: View your shadowing practice history and track progress across videos.
Metadata.practiceDescription: Shadowing practice session — listen, record, and compare your pronunciation.
